title: NeoFine Optimized
description: Light NeoForge Modpack for Optifine User : similar performance mod to Simply Optimized / Wing / Additive
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bf28f42d2297456b97c8d251d15d7234c62fd6a.jpeg)

## ❓ An NeoForge Optimized Modpack For Playing with Optifine.

This modpack has been created in order to use optifine in a more optimized version without breaking vanilla as much as possible, and to allow the use of incompatible modpack resources on other modpacks using sodium.

A Performance Mods similar and inspired from Simply Optimized / Additive / Wing


### ⚠️ YOU NEED OPTIFINE TO RUN THIS MODPACK ⚠️

> 📥 [Optifine 1.20.1 Download Link](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.20.1_HD_U_I6.jar&x=8d7e)


External mods from Curseforge :

> [Optifine Checker - Mod by By Wudji_NotFound](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifine-checker)

> [Krypton Reforged - Mod By Anthxny](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/krypton-reforged)


## Looking For Anything Else ?

Please Check Others Optimization Modpack
